• Procedural mining world with tiered ores, AOE mining, explosions, and custom textures.
  • Full UI: mobile controls, HUD gauges, inventory, shop, warp, admin panel, notifications.
  • Multiplayer via MQTT broker with host election, sync, trading, and autosave support.
    class GameEngine { … }
    class ShopSystem { … }

This HTML defines a mining game where players navigate a procedurally‑generated map, mine resources, build structures and trade with others via a broker. It includes configurable graphics, sound, mobile UI, custom texture support, and persistent save management.
